task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface is visible with the user profile in the top right indicating 'Admin User' or 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the 'Add a new course' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Moodle form with the heading 'Add a new course' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the course full name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Data Science 101' is typed into the 'Course full name' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the course short name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'DS101' is typed into the 'Course short name' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the course category is selected correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Science' is selected in the 'Course category' dropdown menu or selection box.

task_completion.description: Verify the course was successfully saved and created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the newly created 'Data Science 101' course page, a success message, or the course listed in the Moodle course management list under the 'Science' category.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Moodle web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the Moodle GUI. The agent is not using terminal commands (like curl or php scripts) to create the course.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid HTTP URL (e.g., localhost) rather than a local file path or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs 'Data Science 101' and 'DS101' are entered into the actual Moodle web forms, not a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected course full name is 'Data Science 101'. The expected course short name is 'DS101'. The expected course category is 'Science'.
